text:

Log:
  devel/awscli: Update to 1.11.13.

    - Set LICENSE_FILE.
    - Match upstream by setting RUN_DEPENDS to version 1.4.70 for
      devel/py-botocore and version 0.1.9 for net/py-s3transfer.

  PR:		213755
